error_signature: TypeError: supabase.auth.updateUser is not a function
title: Supabase Auth updateUser function not found
symptom: When attempting to update a user's email using the Supabase Auth plugin, a TypeError occurs indicating that 'updateUser' is not a function.
not_this_if: Using a different version of the Supabase SDK
Using a different method to update user
root_cause: The error occurs because the method 'updateUser' does not exist in the current version of the Supabase SDK being used. The correct method to update user information has changed in the SDK, and the user is likely referencing outdated documentation.
fix_steps: Refer to the Supabase SDK v1 documentation for the correct method
Use the method supabase.auth.update instead of updateUser
Call supabase.auth.update({email: 'new@email.com'}) to update the email
agent_instruction: Update the user email using the correct method from the Supabase SDK v1 documentation.
